item.endrem.old_eye.description: §7§oLegends say this eye once belonged to one of the great Sandworms
item.endrem.rogue_eye.description: §7§oThis eye is believed to have given our ancestors the knowledge of Redstone
item.endrem.nether_eye.description: §7§oIt was lost by a demon in the battle between the Aether and the Nether
item.endrem.cold_eye.description: §7§oOne of the last artifacts left behind by the Iceologers before they all suddenly vanished from the world
item.endrem.magical_eye.description: §7§oWithout this eye, the Evoker has no power
item.endrem.black_eye.description: §7§oPirates say it gave sight to the legendary Black pearl
item.endrem.lost_eye.description: §7§oIt is told that it was forged by the first blacksmiths of time
item.endrem.wither_eye.description: §7§oHas witnessed destruction. Maybe it also witnessed your stuff disappear
item.endrem.guardian_eye.description: §7§oIt has seen many warriors drown into the depths of the sea
item.endrem.cursed_eye.description: §7§oA powerful yet destructive artifact; the Piglins swore to protect it at the cost of their lives
item.endrem.exotic_eye.description: §7§oThose who followed this eye were never seen again; rumors say they found the great city of Atlantis, or lost their way trying
item.endrem.evil_eye.description: §7§oA holy talisman said to protect its owner from bad luck
item.endrem.undead_eye.description: §7§oRemembrance of the past lives of those who live in death
item.endrem.corrupted_eye.description: §7§oThe eye of a greedy king that faded in solitude; legend says it will bring infinite fortune to its owner
item.endrem.witch_eye.description: §7§oThis pupil is believed to have seen the ancient brewing recipes that were lost in time.
block.endrem.ender_eye.warning: This eye doesn't want to be used
block.endrem.custom_eye.frame_has_eye: This frame already has an eye
advancements.main.root.title: The Beginning of An Adventure
advancements.main.old_eye.title: Fortune Seeker
advancements.main.rogue_eye.title: Welcome To The Jungle
advancements.main.nether_eye.title: Stare Into Despair
advancements.main.cold_eye.title: A Nice-y Look
advancements.main.corrupted_eye.title: Cover Me In Emeralds
%%%%%%Comment%%%%%%: Golden Shower fits better but whatever...
advancements.main.magical_eye.title: Fallen Sorcerer
advancements.main.black_eye.title: Arghh, Where be Me Ship?
advancements.main.lost_eye.title: Need A Map?
advancements.main.wither_eye.title: Wither You Want It Or Not
advancements.main.guardian_eye.title: Who's Guarding The Temple Now?
advancements.main.cursed_eye.title: A New Protector...
advancements.main.witch_eye.title: Trick-or-Treat?
advancements.main.evil_eye.title: A Real Blessing
advancements.main.exotic_eye.title: Where's Atlantis?
advancements.main.undead_eye.title: The Mirror Of The Soul
advancements.main.cryptic_eye.title: Patience Is The Road To Wisdom
advancements.main.sculk_eye.title: What the eyes do not see
advancements.main.sculk_eye.description: §7§oGet into the dark depths of the Overworld and face the fearsome Warden.
advancements.main.aurora_eye.title: Frozen Heart
advancements.main.aurora_eye.description: §7§oMelt away the cold of the Snow Queen at the Aurora Palace.
advancements.main.carminite_eye.title: Phantom Sorrow
advancements.main.carminite_eye.descript: §7§oPut an end to the Ur-Ghast in the Dark Towers
advancements.main.fiery_eye.title: Divide and Conquer
advancements.main.fiery_eye.description: §7§oIn the Twilight Forest defeat the Hydra in its lair.
advancements.main.abyss_eye.title: What lies in the depths
advancements.main.abyss_eye.description: §7§oChallenge the ocean beast and get the Abyssal Eye as a trophy of the Leviathan.
advancements.main.mech_eye.title: Tough as Nails
advancements.main.mech_eye.description: §7§oScrap the Harbinger in its arena and rip out its Mech Eye.
advancements.main.monstrous_eye.title: Hotter than Lava
advancements.main.monstrous_eye.descript: §7§oImmerse yourself in the heat of the Nether and defeat the great monstrosity in its forge.
advancements.main.flame_eye.title: We remain in the ashes
advancements.main.flame_eye.description: §7§oOnly a hero aurora is worthy of victory. Well done.
advancements.main.void_eye.title: Far beyond the End
advancements.main.void_eye.description: §7§oDefeat the Ender Guardian who awaits you below his citadel.
advancements.main.parasite_eye.title: The Worm in the Apple
advancements.main.parasite_eye.descripti: §7§oFree the void from its parasitic menace.
advancements.main.desert_eye.title: This belongs in a museum
advancements.main.desert_eye.description: §7§oDefeat the Ancient Remnant and extinguish it forever.
tooltip.endrem.sculk_eye: §7§oIt is rough and hard to the touch, but the light it emits is soft and comforting
tooltip.endrem.carminite_eye: §7§oIt gives off a horrible, ghostly feeling
tooltip.endrem.aurora_eye: §7§oAn overwhelming cold can be felt from its gaze.
tooltip.endrem.fiery_eye: §7§oIt looks like it might split apart at any moment.
tooltip.endrem.abyss_eye: §7§oA symbol of dominance over the deep waters, it exudes an enigmatic power
tooltip.endrem.mech_eye: §7§oA glimmering artifact that twists and resonates at its inner core
tooltip.endrem.monstrous_eye: §7§oYou can feel a pulsating heat along with the whisper of the fire
tooltip.endrem.void_eye: §7§oThe void's pulsing energy emanates from within. Threatening.
tooltip.endrem.flame_eye: §7§oThe Flame Eye, a symbol of strength and honor. Use it with dignity.
tooltip.endrem.parasite_eye: §7§oAn eye with an empty look that rumbles and vibrates in your hand.
tooltip.endrem.desert_eye: §7§oIts bright pupil reflects the vestiges of a very ancient era.
tooltip.minecraft.shulker_head: §7§oA remnant of the armored creature, its hollow interior seems to whisper of the Void.
tooltip.dungeons_mobs.wildfire_core: §7§oForged in scorched flames, this core pulses with the wrath of a ruler who once ruled the Nether Fortress.
tooltip.minecraft.slime_core: §7§oThough inert, it trembles as if eager to split and multiply once more.
tooltip.alexsmobs.chorus_dust: §7§oCollected from the drifting wake of a fallen Endergrade, this dust pulses with the gentle hum of End energy.
tooltip.alexsmobs.ectoplasm: §7§oA formless essence, neither solid nor air, lingering from a ghostly being.
tooltip.mutantmore.mutant_blaze_core_fra: §7§oEven divided, each fragment pulses with the wrath of a fallen Mutant Blaze.
tooltip.cataclysm.void_core_fragment: §7§oFragmented from a greater core, it radiates a dangerous pull toward nothingness.
tooltip.dungeons_mobs.wind_essence: §7§oInvisible currents whirl within, a bottled breath of storm and sky.
tooltip.cataclysm.ender_guardian_arm: §7§oHeavy and unyielding, this arm carries the essence of the titan it once belonged to.
tooltip.cataclysm.heater_engine: §7§oA blazing relic of the Monstrosity, its inner fire still roars like a furnace unquenched.
tooltip.minecraft.goat_hide: §7§oThe hide of a sure-footed climber, still echoing the chill of the mountains.
